name: Catherine Cortez-Masto
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $3,180,044 for Catherine Cortez-Masto in U.S. Senate, NV. This dataset currently classifies this as Pro-Israel when total funding is above $0; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.
